A '''battle''' occurred during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] in the [[Al'Har system]].

==The battle==
It was fought between at least one [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] and a [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] force that came from the [[Malastare system/Legends|Malastare system]].

From what is known, the Jedi destroyed most or all of their opponents, but their ships sustained heavy damage and crash-landed on the only world in that [[Star system/Legends|star system]], [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

==Aftermath==
The Krath forces moved on to the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]].

Their descendants were undoubtedly the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] "[[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]]" people, to whom [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] belonged.

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Al'Har was mentioned in [[Shatterpoint/Legends|''Shatterpoint'']]. In ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', that a battle was fought in the Haruun Kal system was stipulated on the galactic map showing the battles of the Great Sith War.
